title: AI Layers
subtitle: Registry-backed AI capability layers preserved in the product shell.

layers.label: Analyzer
layers.summary: Reads deterministic truth and produces structured analysis.

layers.label: Explainer
layers.summary: Turns scores and events into readable evidence-bound explanations.

layers.label: Risk Critic
layers.summary: Flags weak evidence, regime drift, and confidence erosion.

layers.label: Operator Recommender
layers.summary: Suggests operator actions within permission and evidence boundaries.

layers.label: Auditor Commentary
layers.summary: Summarizes audit findings without overriding deterministic truth.
